scores.correctness_notes: The gold standard focuses on the data schema (databag contents: name, model, port in app databag; host in unit databag) and explicitly notes the Python API is not in charmlibs docs. The agent instead provides detailed Python API usage which diverges from the gold standard's scope. The gold standard recommends v1 while agent uses v2. IngressPerAppRequirer is mentioned in gold standard but the detailed Python API shown cannot be verified.
scores.hallucination_notes: Several unverifiable API details: strip_prefix and redirect_https constructor params, is_ready() method, on.ready/on.revoked event names, IngressPerAppReadyEvent/IngressPerAppRevokedEvent types, provide_ingress_requirements() method. The gold standard explicitly states the Python API is documented in the traefik-k8s-operator repo, not in charmlibs, making these details unverifiable and potentially fabricated. URL format shown (/<model>-<app>/) differs slightly from gold standard (/<model>-<unit>/).
